summary: 2 film announcements, 2 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Manhunt
film.announcement: Cinetic Media acquires North American sales rights to 'Manhunt,' a Locarno Main Competition contender.

film.title: Behind the Rain
film.announcement: Acclaimed Chilean filmmaker Valeria Sarmiento's childhood sexual abuse drama 'Behind the Rain' marks her farewell to directing.

tv.title: The Lords' Day
tv.talent: Damson Idris, Harry Lawtey, Arsema Thomas, Timothy Spall
tv.announcement: Netflix series adds Harry Lawtey, Arsema Thomas, Timothy Spall and more to cast alongside Damson Idris.

tv.title: Adarsh Baal Vidyalaya
tv.announcement: Prime Video sets July premiere date for 'Adarsh Baal Vidyalaya' starring Kay Kay Menon.
